heroTitle: SGC – General List of Subject Headings COBISS.SI
heroSubtitle: Search and explore approximately 75,000 SGC subject headings with interactive hierarchical and associative relationships
feature1Desc: Search through 75,000 SGC subject headings in the general controlled vocabulary SGC, available in Slovenian and English.
feature2Desc: Visualize hierarchical and associative relationships with an interactive force-directed graph. Explore broader, narrower, and related terms.
feature3Desc: Navigate through concept hierarchies with clear parent-child relationships and explore the full network of related terms.
feature4Desc: All terms are available in both Slovenian and English, making the vocabulary accessible to international users.
aboutDesc: SGC Navigator is a web-based navigator for the general controlled vocabulary SGC, a controlled list of subject headings in the Slovenian COBISS.SI system. This tool enables users and librarians to explore interconnected concepts and their relationships.
aboutCardDesc: The SGC (Splošni geslovnik COBISS) Navigator provides an advanced semantic visual interface for the exhaustive Slovenian thesaurus. Leveraging graph technologies, it turns hundreds of thousands of controlled vocabulary entries into an explorer-friendly format, showcasing exactly how concepts interrelate structurally and linguistically.
aboutCardNote: Developed to support researchers, indexers, and developers interacting with structured bibliographic data.
designedFor1: COBISS Plus users seeking structured vocabulary
designedFor2: Librarians managing subject indexing and cataloging
whatYouCan1: Search for specific terms and concepts
whatYouCan2: Explore broader terms (hypernyms) and narrower terms (hyponyms)
whatYouCan3: Discover related terms and associated concepts
ctaText: Start by using the search bar above to find a term of interest, or explore the interactive graph to discover new connections and relationships in the vocabulary.
graphOverviewDesc: Explore the interactive network of related, broader, and narrower concepts.
hierarchyLayoutDesc: Browse the selected concept with broader terms above, shared/related terms grouped, and narrower terms below.
noDefinition: No definition is available for this concept yet.
noGroupsExpanded: No groups are expanded. Use the buttons above to show broader, related, or narrower terms.
cardGraphDesc: Experience relationships naturally. Our force-directed graph renderer smoothly animates connections between broader, narrower, and related concepts in real-time.
cardHierarchyDesc: Navigate strict vertical trees of taxonomical breadth intuitively.
cardBilingualDesc: Seamlessly fluid translations mappings between Slovenian and English localized terms.
seoSearchTitle: SGC Navigator | Search COBISS General Subject Headings
seoSearchDescription: Search and explore COBISS subject headings through an interactive semantic graph and hierarchy.
seoSearchKeywords: SGC Navigator, COBISS, subject headings, semantic search, thesaurus, graph
seoGraphDescription: Explore the semantic relationships, broader terms, and narrower concepts for {{conceptName}} inside the COBISS SGC system.
seoGraphKeywords: SGC Navigator, COBISS, concept relationships, broader terms, narrower concepts, semantic graph
